claims: The repository contains a forward monotonicity theorem for GaifmanDistanceLe.
The repository contains a forward monotonicity theorem for AssignmentGaifmanClose.
The proved direction is r ≤ s, AssignmentGaifmanClose M r ρ τ implies AssignmentGaifmanClose M s ρ τ.
nonclaims: Does not prove the reverse direction AssignmentGaifmanClose M s ρ τ implies AssignmentGaifmanClose M r ρ τ.
Does not prove radius monotonicity of locality input surfaces.
Does not prove max-radius conjunction closure.
Does not prove max-radius disjunction closure.
Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
